label: SMART Alloys
description: Smart Alloy Insurance will suit the Demands and Needs of an individual who has purchased an eligible vehicle (age and mileage) and who wishes to insure themselves against the unforeseen cost of repairing accidental alloy wheel damage. Subject to Terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits. Details of these can be found in your policy information. If you do not have this please ask your supplying dealer for a copy.

label: Alloy Wheel Insurance
description: Scratches and scrapes to your alloys affect the look and value of your car, our Alloy Wheel insurance is a convenient way to keep your car looking at its showroom best
eligibility_considerations: wheel size and construction (e.g. Single piece rather than split rim, painted rather than chrome)

label: Finance and Leasing Protection
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual who wishes to insure against a shortfall between an insurance settlement figure in the event of a total loss motor insurance claim and the settlement figure due to a lease company after such an event. Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits; details of which may be found in your policy booklet. If you do not have one of these please ask for a copy to aid you in making your own informed buying decision.

label: Contract Lease Hire GAP
eligibility_considerations: taking into account the requirement for the vehicle to be on an appropriate lease

label: Contract Hire and Finance GAP
eligibility_considerations: taking into account depreciation and level of deposit.Note the vehicle must not be insured under a motor trade policy.

label: Combined GAP
description: Should you be unfortunate enough to write off your car, Combined gap will PAY YOU the difference between your insurance settlement figure and either your vehicle price or any car finance settlement figure, whichever is higher!

label: SMART, Cosmetic and Alloy
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual wishing to insure themselves against unforeseen costs resulting from vehicle damage not covered or under the motor insurance excess figure such as: minor dents, light scratches, chips or scuffed bumpers and the unforeseen cost of repairing accidental alloy wheel damage. Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits; details of which may be found in your policy booklet. If you do not have one of these please ask for a copy to aid you in making your own informed buying decision.

label: SMART, Cosmetic
description: SMART Insurance is designed to cover the cost of repairing the body panels of your vehicle as a result of minor body damage (subject to size and location limitation). Subject to terms and conditions, confirmed in the Insurance Product Information Document. The aim of SMART Insurance is to offer a quick and effective repair usually at your home or place of work.
eligibility_considerations: modifications and the paint finish e.g. not matt finish

label: SMART, Tyre and Alloy
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual wishing to insure themselves against unforeseen costs resulting from vehicle damage not covered or under the motor insurance excess figure such as: minor dents, light scratches, chips or scuffed bumpers, the unforeseen cost of repairing accidental alloy wheel damage and repairing or replacing punctured tyres. Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits; details of which may be found in your policy booklet.
eligibility_considerations: paint finish e.g. not matt finish
wheel size and construction (e.g. Single piece rather than split rim, painted rather than chrome)

label: Caravan Insurance
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual wishing to insure themselves against unforeseen costs resulting from an incident involving their caravan. Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits; details of which may be found in your policy booklet. If you do not have one of these please ask for a copy to aid you in making your own informed buying decision.

label: Finance Lease or Hire Top up Gap
eligibility_considerations: taking into account depreciation and level of deposit

label: Ford Commercial GAP
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual who wishes to be compensated for  the monetary difference between an insurance settlement figure in the event of a total loss motor insurance claim and the greater of either the original invoice price of the vehicle (less excluded extras) or the finance settlement figure (less excluded extras). Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits; details of which may be found in your policy booklet. If you do not have one of these please ask for a copy to aid you in making your own informed buying decision.

label: Ford Cosmetic Insurance
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual wishing to insure themselves against unforeseen costs resulting from vehicle damage not covered or under the motor insurance excess figure such as: minor dents, light scratches, chips or scuffed bumpers. Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits.

label: Finance GAP
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual who has taken finance on a vehicle, with a low deposit to loan ratio, who has not carried over a balance from a previous vehicle finance agreement and who wishes to insure against a shortfall between an insurance settlement figure in the event of a total loss motor insurance claim and the outstanding balance on their finance agreement. Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions and maximum specified claim limits; details of which may be found in your policy booklet. If you do not have one of these please ask for a copy to aid you in making your own informed buying decision.
eligibility_considerations: taking into account depreciation and level of deposit

label: Key Insurance
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual who owns a motor vehicle and wishes to insure against the costs in the event that keys to the vehicle are lost or damaged. Subject to policy exclusions, terms, conditions, and specified claim limits.

label: Contract Hire GAP
description: This insurance will satisfy the Demands and Needs of an individual who wishes to insure against a shortfall between an insurance settlement figure in the event of a total loss motor insurance claim and the settlement figure due to a lease company after such an event. label: LPG Mechanical Breakdown Insurance
description: This policy will suit the Demands and Needs of someone who has had an LPG conversion on their vehicle and who wishes to insure themselves against unforeseen costs following the breakdown of a vehicle due to works undertaken during the conversion.
